# Memory Entry Template

Use this template for durable, reusable memory entries.

## Header
- Priority: `critical | helpful | archive`
- Workspace: `<repo-or-global>`
- Date: `<YYYY-MM-DD>`
- Owner: `<name-or-team>`

## What
- `<short fact or decision>`

## Why
- `<why this matters for future work>`

## Evidence
- File(s): `<path>`
- Command(s): `<command>`
- Link(s): `<optional>`

## Usage Trigger
- Use this when: `<specific scenario>`

## Expiry / Review
- Review by: `<YYYY-MM-DD or N/A>`
- Update needed when: `<condition>`
